_comment: TEMPLATE only. The authoritative target registry ships with the Proteina-Complexa repo (configs/targets/targets_dict.yaml) — run `complexa target list` in your checkout for the real, full set, and select one with ++generation.task_name=<task_name>. To add your own: `complexa target add <task_name> --pdb target.pdb --chain <C> --span <lo-hi> --hotspots <res,res> --binder-length <lo-hi>` (see references/complexa-cli.md and references/target-and-hotspots.md).

registry.name: <your target>
registry.note: register with `complexa target add`, or pick one from `complexa target list`
